heading: Limitation on grants to any one State
label: 804 Limitation on grants to any one State
text: Not more than 10 per centum of the total amount appropriated for the purposes of this chapter may be used for making grants to any one State.
notes: Amendments1969— substituted provisions that not more than 10 per centum of the total amount appropriated be used for making grants to any one State for provisions that authorized the Secretary to provide technical assistance, etc., to State and local bodies. The former provisions of the section are now set forth in with minor amendments.Pub. L. 91–152section 805 of this title1967— substituted “Secretary” for “Administrator” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 90–19
